text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, you want some of our power?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I wanna beat Teio with it!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Teio says that whenever she runs with you guys
she can't figure out her pacing. So I wanna run
with you to beat her!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What, so like you want to become an apprentice?
Time for a quiz, young grasshopper! ☆ When a
race starts, what's the first thing you do?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Even if you're a long shot?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: If I can do all that, then I win!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! Sounds good to me. Let's go tear it up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, Turbo winning sounds good? Uh, I guess
we just... lose, then?
